section_name: Pedestrians to use right half of crosswalks
text: Pedestrians shall move, whenever practicable, upon the right half of crosswalks.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 7
#### Article 27. Pedestrians' Rights & Duties
##### § 1155 — Pedestrians to use right half of crosswalks

Pedestrians shall move, whenever practicable, upon the right half of crosswalks.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: Pedestrians shall move, whenever practicable, upon the right half of crosswalks.
